raw_consumer_statement: Wayfair store credit card info was breached online. Increase in credit line requested without my permission. Became aware when received text that furniture was being delivered to Florida Address/I live in NY. Called Wayfair to enter dispute over {$5000.00} worth of fraudulent charges. Cancelled credit card. I Am still receiving texts RE : furniture being delivered to Florida address. I feel that this has not been resolved. Am a victim of identity theft. Phone service hacked along with XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX Credit card. Police report also filed.
